sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70325" key="neope/peiros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νεο-πέπειρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n70325.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">just ripe,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
